description: Admin defines class dates, trial-eligible dates, and capacity. Parents see only available slots for trial booking and open enrollment programs.

screens.description: Admin view to define and manage class dates, trial dates, and capacity

features.description: Admin defines individual class session dates for each program

requirements.description: Admin can add, edit, and remove individual class dates for a program
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Class dates appear on a calendar view; changes are saved immediately and reflected in parent-facing views

requirements.description: Admin can mark specific dates as trial-eligible
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Trial-eligible dates are visually distinct on the admin calendar; only these dates appear in the parent trial date picker

features.description: Admin sets capacity per program and monitors fill levels

requirements.description: Admin can set max capacity per program
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Capacity field is editable; current enrollment count vs capacity is displayed

requirements.description: System auto-locks enrollment when capacity is reached
requirements.acceptance_criteria: When enrollment count equals capacity, parent-facing enrollment is disabled; admin can still manually add enrollments

screens.description: Read-only view for parents showing available trial dates and open programs

features.description: Parents see available trial dates and can select one to book

requirements.description: Calendar displays only trial-eligible dates for the selected program that have not reached trial capacity
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Full trial dates do not appear as selectable; selecting a date leads to the trial booking form

business_rules.rule: Only future trial-eligible dates with available capacity are shown to parents
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Past dates and full dates are excluded from parent-facing calendar

business_rules.rule: Admin can override auto-lock to add enrollments or trial bookings beyond capacity
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Admin has an override toggle or action that bypasses capacity restriction for individual cases
